title: Microwave oven is invented
subtitle: Invented by Percy Spencer
fact: A microwave oven, or simply microwave, is an electric oven that heats and cooks food by exposing it to electromagnetic radiation in the microwave frequency range.

title: Vacuum cleaner is invented
subtitle: Invented by Hubert Cecil Booth
fact: A vacuum cleaner, also known simply as a vacuum, is a device that uses suction, and often agitation, in order to remove dirt and other debris from carpets, hard floors, and other surfaces.

title: Sewing machine is invented
subtitle: Invented by Thomas Saint
fact: A sewing machine is a machine used to sew fabric and materials together with thread.

title: AGA cooker is invented
subtitle: Invented by Nils Gustaf Dalén
fact: The Aga Range Cooker is a Swedish range cooker.

title: Franklin stove is invented
subtitle: Invented by Benjamin Franklin
fact: The Franklin stove is a metal-lined fireplace named after Benjamin Franklin, who invented it in 1742.

title: Chemex Coffeemaker is invented
subtitle: Invented by Peter Schlumbohm
fact: The Chemex Coffeemaker is a manual pour-over style glass coffeemaker, invented by Peter Schlumbohm in 1941, manufactured by the Chemex Corporation in Chicopee, Massachusetts.
